IFEval, Reasoning On. From Table 4 of the technical report, which reports both modes for the final LN-Super checkpoint (on=89.2, off=89.0). The HF model card/NIM docs publish only a single IFEval value (89.21) explicitly labeled 'Reasoning Off' with no Reasoning-On figure at all -- so this paper-sourced on-mode value fills a genuine gap versus the card, though note the close-but-not-identical off-mode figures (89.0 in the paper vs 89.21 on the card) suggest some methodological variance between the two official publications.
